content: I will update `discord-bot/index.js` using `replace_file_content` to add comprehensive logging of the OAuth credentials and code parameters before sending the token exchange request, and format the request using HTTP Basic Authentication (which is the recommended method for Discord's token exchange endpoint). This will help us pinpoint and fix the `invalid_grant` error.

args.Description: "Use Basic Auth for Discord token exchange and add detailed OAuth parameter logging."
args.Instruction: "Modify token exchange request in discord-bot/index.js to use HTTP Basic Authentication and add console logs."
